ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wafers" (
  "wafer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wafer */,
  "scribe_id" TEXT /* Scribe ID of the wafer */,
  "lot_id" TEXT /* Lot ID of the wafer */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date and time of inspection */,
  "wafer_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the wafer */,
  "wafer_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the wafer */,
  "fabrication_date" TEXT /* Date and time of fabrication */,
  "fabrication_line" TEXT /* ID of the fabrication line */,
  "fabrication_machine" TEXT /* ID of the machine used for fabrication */,
  "fabrication_operator" TEXT /* ID of the operator who performed the fabrication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wafer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wafers_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("lot_id") REFERENCES lots ("lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lots" (
  "lot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each lot */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product ID associated with the lot */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Process ID associated with the lot */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lot */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lot */,
  "total_wafers" INTEGER /* Total number of wafers in the lot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the lot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lots_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lots_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the product */,
  "target_yield" REAL /* Target yield for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the process */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps in the process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "wafer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wafer the defect belongs to */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the defect */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the defect */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the defect (e.g., none, scratch, etc.) */,
  "inspection_operator" TEXT /* ID of the operator who performed the inspection */,
  "inspection_machine" TEXT /* ID of the machine used for inspection */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the defect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the defect was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the defect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_wafer_id FOREIGN KEY ("wafer_id") REFERENCES wafers ("wafer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wafer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wafer being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wafer */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wafer_id FOREIGN KEY ("wafer_id") REFERENCES wafers ("wafer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
